mapper.select: SELECT RATE_ID, RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_ID = #{rateId}
SELECT R.RATE_ID, P.PROD_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST R JOIN NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS P ON P.RATE_ID = R.RATE_ID AND P.PROD_CD = #{prodCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCP_USER (USER_ID, USER_NM, STATUS_CD) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userNm}, #{statusCd})
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_USER SET USER_NM = #{userNm}, UPD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
